reference: I have been told I have asthma for a long time and have been treated with albuterol inhalers and occasional prednisone. Recently, I have taken Dulera and Qvar to calm persistent phlegm throughout the day. I get relief from bronchospasm but little reduction of phlegm. My question is: might I also have bronchitis along with asthma? If so, might a muscarinic agent be helpful? Jim.
text: I have been told I have asthma for a long time and have been treated with albuterol inhalers and occasional prednisone. Recently, I have taken Dalyra and Qvar to calm persistent phlegm throughout the day. I get relief from bronchospasm, but little reduction of phlegm. My question is, might I also have bronchitis along with asthma? If so, might a muscarinic agent be helpful? Jim.
